p.ex: [w toha :c] [w byt :i 3sg] [w pylat] [w vzeti :i lptc.m] [w ysus :i obl.sg] [w i] [w byt :i 3sg] [w go] [w bičevat :i lptc.m].

sec.p: "Then Pilate took Jesus and scourged him."

p.ex: [w ti :c] [w rytar :i pl] [w byt :i 3pl] [w sdelat :i lptc.pl] [w venetsa :i obl.sg] [w od] [w tern :i pl], [w i] [w byt :i 3pl] [w go] [w vozložit :i lptc.pl] [w na] [w taf] [w nehov :i f.sg] [w hlava :i obl.sg], [w i] [w byt :i 3pl] [w go] [w oblekat :i lptc.pl] [w ve] [w riza :i obl.sg] [w purpurə :i f.sg], [w i] [w byt :i 3pl] [w hovorit :i lptc.pl]: «[w radovat :i imp.2sg] [w se], [w kral] [w idovsky :i m.sg]!»

sec.p: "The soldiers made a crown of thorns, placed it on his head, clothed him in a purple robe, and said, 'Rejoice, king of the Jews!'"

p.ex: [w i :c] [w byt :i 3pl] [w go] [w bičevat :i lptc.pl] [w po] [w lanita :i obl.sg].

sec.p: "And they struck him on the cheeks."

p.ex: [w toha :c] [w byt :i 3sg] [w pylat] [w pak] [w vyžat :i lptc.m] [w i] [w byt :i 3sg] [w rekat :i lptc.m] [w do] [w nykh]: «[w hledat :i imp.2sg], [w az] [w go] [w pokazat :i 1sg] [w do] [w vas], [w dat :i 3sg] [w znat :i 2pl] [w dak] [w az] [w ne] [w vydit :i 1sg] [w vina :i obl.sg] [w ve] [w neho].»

sec.p: "Then Pilate came out again and said to them: 'Look, I show him to you so that you may know that I find no guilt in him.'"

p.ex: [w toha :c] [w byt :i 3sg] [w ysus] [w vyžat :i lptc.m], [w nosit :i ppl] [w so] [w venetsa :i obl.sg] [w od] [w tern :i pl] [w i] [w so] [w riza :i obl.sg] [w purpurə].

sec.p: "Then Jesus came out, wearing the crown of thorns and the purple robe."

p.ex: [w i :c] [w pylat] [w byt :i 3sg] [w rekat :i lptc.m] [w do] [w nykh]: «[w hledat :i imp.2sg], [w sej] [w čelovek]!»

sec.p: "And Pilate said to them: 'Behold the man!'"

p.ex: [w koga :c] [w byt :i 3pl] [w go] [w ti] [w sveštenik :i pl] [w hlavni] [w i] [w sluha :i pl] [w vydit :i lptc.pl], [w ony] [w byt :i 3pl] [w vykat :i lptc.pl] [w i] [w byt :i 3pl] [w hovorit :i lptc.pl]: «[w ukrstovat :i imp.2pl] [w go], [w ukrstovat :i imp.2pl] [w go]!»

sec.p: "When the chief priests and attendants saw him, they cried out and said: 'Crucify him, crucify him!'"

p.ex: [w pylat] [w byt :i 3sg] [w rekat :i lptc.m] [w do] [w nykh]: «[w vzeti :i imp.2pl] [w go] [w vy] [w i] [w ukrstovat :i imp.2pl] [w go]; [w zače] [w az] [w ne] [w vydit :i 1sg] [w vina :i obl.sg] [w ve] [w neho].»

sec.p: "Pilate said to them: 'Take him yourselves and crucify him, for I find no guilt in him.'"

p.ex: [w ti :c] [w idov :i pl] [w byt :i 3pl] [w mu] [w odhovorit :i lptc.pl]: «[w my] [w ymat :i 1pl] [w zakon :i obl.sg], [w i] [w po] [w ta] [w naš] [w zakon :i obl.sg] [w on] [w morat :i 3sg] [w umret], [w zače] [w on] [w byt :i 3sg] [w sdelat :i lptc.m] [w sebe] [w syn] [w od] [w bog :i obl.sg].»

sec.p: "The Jews answered him: 'We have a law, and according to our law he must die, because he made himself the Son of God.'"

p.ex: [w koga :c] [w byt :i 3sg] [w pylat] [w slišat :i lptc.m] [w to] [w slovo :i obl.sg], [w on] [w byt :i 3sg] [w se] [w bojat :i lptc.m] [w uše] [w bole] [w od] [w pred].

sec.p: "When Pilate heard that saying, he became even more afraid than before."

p.ex: [w on :c] [w byt :i 3sg] [w pak] [w vlezit :i lptc.m] [w ve] [w dvor :i obl.sg] [w i] [w byt :i 3sg] [w prašat :i lptc.m] [w ysus :i obl.sg]: «[w od] [w kəde] [w byt :i 2sg] [w ty]?»

sec.p: "He entered the court again and asked Jesus: 'Where are you from?'"

p.ex: [w ale :c] [w ysus] [w ni] [w mu] [w dat :i lptc.m] [w otvet :i obl.sg].

sec.p: "But Jesus gave him no answer."

p.ex: [w toha :c] [w byt :i 3sg] [w pylat] [w rekat :i lptc.m] [w do] [w neho]: «[w ty] [w ne] [w xotit :i 2sg] [w li] [w hovorit] [w do] [w mene]? [w ty] [w ne] [w znat :i 2sg] [w li] [w dak] [w az] [w ymat :i 1sg] [w vlast :i obl.sg] [w pustit] [w tebe], [w i] [w ymat :i 1sg] [w vlast :i obl.sg] [w ukrstovat] [w tebe]?»

sec.p: "Then Pilate said to him: 'Will you not speak to me? Do you not know that I have authority to release you, and authority to crucify you?'"

p.ex: [w ysus] [w byt :i 3sg] [w mu] [w rekat :i lptc.m]: «[w ty] [w ne] [w by] [w ymat :i lptc.m] [w vlast :i obl.sg] [w nad] [w mene], [w ako] [w se] [w ne] [w by] [w dat :i lptc.n] [w do] [w tebe] [w od] [w hore]; [w stoha] [w ta] [w ky] [w byt :i 3sg] [w me] [w predat :i lptc.m] [w do] [w tebe] [w ymat :i 3sg] [w po] [w holemə] [w grex :i obl.sg].»

sec.p: "Jesus answered him: 'You would have no authority over me unless it had been given to you from above; therefore the one who handed me over to you has the greater sin.'"

p.ex: [w toha :c] [w byt :i 3sg] [w go] [w pylat] [w iskat :i lptc.m] [w pustit], [w ale] [w idov :i pl] [w byt :i 3pl] [w vopijat :i lptc.pl] [w i] [w byt :i 3pl] [w hovorit :i lptc.pl]: «[w ako] [w ty] [w pustit :i 2sg] [w sej] [w čelovek :i obl.sg], [w ty] [w byt.neg :i 2sg] [w pryyatel] [w od] [w tsar :i obl.sg :c]. [w vsekoj :c], [w ky] [w se] [w glagolat :i 3sg] [w kral], [w se] [w protivit :i 3sg] [w tsar :i obl.sg :c].»

sec.p: "Then Pilate wanted to release him, but the Jews cried out and said: 'If you release this man, you are no friend of Caesar. Everyone who calls himself king opposes Caesar.'"

p.ex: [w koga :c] [w byt :i 3sg] [w pylat] [w slišat :i lptc.m] [w to] [w slovo :i obl.sg], [w on] [w byt :i 3sg] [w vydit :i lptc.m] [w ysus :i obl.sg] [w nadvorə] [w i] [w byt :i 3sg] [w sedat :i lptc.m] [w na] [w sudište :i obl.sg], [w na] [w mesto :i obl.sg], [w ky] [w se] [w glagolat :i 3sg] [w kameno] [w postlanie], [w a] [w po] [w idovsky] [w gavvata].

sec.p: "When Pilate heard that saying, he brought Jesus out and sat down on the judgment seat, at the place called the Stone Pavement, and in Jewish speech Gabbatha."

p.ex: [w i :c] [w byt :i lptc.m] [w den] [w priprava :i obl.sg] [w od] [w pasxa :i obl.sg], [w okolo] [w šest] [w ura :i obl.sg].

sec.p: "And it was the day of preparation for Passover, about the sixth hour."

p.ex: [w i :c] [w on] [w byt :i 3sg] [w rekat :i lptc.m] [w do] [w idov :i pl]: «[w hledat :i imp.2sg], [w vaš] [w kral]!»

sec.p: "And he said to the Jews: 'Behold your king!'"

p.ex: [w ale :c] [w ony] [w byt :i 3pl] [w vykat :i lptc.pl]: «[w odnest :i imp.2pl] [w go], [w odnest :i imp.2pl] [w go], [w ukrstovat :i imp.2pl] [w go]!»

sec.p: "But they cried out: 'Take him away, take him away, crucify him!'"

p.ex: [w pylat] [w byt :i 3sg] [w ykh] [w prašat :i lptc.m]: «[w az] [w ukrstovat :i 1sg] [w li] [w vaš] [w kral :i obl.sg]?»

sec.p: "Pilate asked them: 'Shall I crucify your king?'"

p.ex: [w ti :c] [w sveštenik :i pl] [w hlavni] [w byt :i 3pl] [w odhovorit :i lptc.pl]: «[w my] [w ne] [w ymat :i 1pl] [w kral :i obl.sg], [w osem] [w tsar :i obl.sg :c].»

sec.p: "The chief priests answered: 'We have no king except Caesar.'"

p.ex: [w toha :c] [w byt :i 3sg] [w go] [w on] [w predat :i lptc.m] [w do] [w nykh], [w dat :i 3sg] [w byt :i 3sg] [w on] [w ukrstovat :i ppp.c].

sec.p: "Then he handed him over to them, that he might be crucified."

p.ex: [w toha :c] [w byt :i 3pl] [w go] [w ony] [w vzeti :i lptc.pl] [w ysus :i obl.sg].

sec.p: "Then they took Jesus."

p.ex: [w i :c] [w on], [w nosit :i ppl] [w ta] [w suoj :i m.sg] [w krst], [w byt :i 3sg] [w vydit :i lptc.m] [w na] [w mesto :i obl.sg], [w ky] [w se] [w glagolat :i 3sg] [w lobno :i n.sg] [w mesto], [w a] [w po] [w idovsky :i f.sg] [w holhota].

sec.p: "And he, carrying his own cross, went out to the place called the Skull Place, and in Jewish speech Golgotha."

p.ex: [w tam :c] [w byt :i 3pl] [w go] [w ony] [w ukrstovat :i lptc.pl], [w i] [w so] [w neho] [w druga] [w doua], [w edyn] [w na] [w edyn :i obl.f.sg] [w strana :i obl.sg] [w i] [w edyn] [w na] [w druga :i obl.f.sg], [w a] [w ysus :i obl.sg] [w posredi].

sec.p: "There they crucified him, and with him two others, one on one side and one on the other, and Jesus in the middle."

p.ex: [w pylat] [w byt :i 3sg] [w pysat :i lptc.m] [w i] [w slovo] [w i] [w byt :i 3sg] [w go] [w položit :i lptc.m] [w na] [w krst :i obl.sg].

sec.p: "Pilate also wrote an inscription and placed it on the cross."

p.ex: [w i :c] [w to] [w slovo] [w byt :i lptc.n]: «[w ysus] [w nazarjanin], [w kral] [w idovsky].»

sec.p: "And the inscription was: 'Jesus of Nazareth, king of the Jews.'"

p.ex: [w mnoho :c] [w od] [w idov :i pl] [w byt :i 3pl] [w čitat :i lptc.pl] [w to] [w slovo :i obl.sg], [w zače] [w to] [w mesto] [w byt :i 3sg] [w se] [w ysus] [w byt :i lptc.m] [w ukrstovat :i lptc.m] [w byt :i lptc.n] [w pri] [w hrad :i obl.sg], [w i] [w to] [w slovo] [w se] [w byt :i lptc.n] [w pysat :i lptc.n] [w po] [w idovsky], [w po] [w latynsky], [w i] [w po] [w hrecky].

sec.p: "Many of the Jews read that inscription, because the place where Jesus had been crucified was near the city, and the inscription was written in Jewish, Latin, and Greek."

p.ex: [w toha :c] [w byt :i 3pl] [w ti] [w sveštenik :i pl] [w hlavni] [w od] [w idov :i pl] [w rekat :i lptc.pl] [w do] [w pylat :i obl.sg]: «[w ne] [w pysat :i imp.2sg]: “[w kral] [w idovsky],” [w ale]: “[w sej] [w čelovek] [w byt :i 3sg] [w rekat :i lptc.m]: ‘[w az] [w byt :i 1sg] [w kral] [w idovsky].’”»

sec.p: "Then the chief priests of the Jews said to Pilate: 'Do not write, “King of the Jews,” but rather: “This man said, ‘I am king of the Jews.’”'"

p.ex: [w pylat] [w byt :i 3sg] [w ym] [w odhovorit :i lptc.m]: «[w to :c] [w če] [w byt :i 1sg] [w az] [w pysat :i lptc.m], [w az] [w byt :i 1sg] [w pysat :i lptc.m].»

sec.p: "Pilate answered them: 'What I have written, I have written.'"

p.ex: [w toha :c] [w byt :i 3pl] [w ti] [w rytar :i pl], [w koga] [w byt :i 3pl] [w ukrstovat :i lptc.pl] [w ysus :i obl.sg], [w vzeti :i lptc.pl] [w ti] [w nehov :i pl] [w rob :i pl] [w i] [w byt :i 3pl] [w sdelat :i lptc.pl] [w na] [w četyri] [w dol :i pl], [w po] [w edyn] [w na] [w vsjakə] [w rytar :i obl.sg], [w i] [w taf] [w riza].

sec.p: "Then the soldiers, when they had crucified Jesus, took his garments and made four parts, one for each soldier, and also the tunic."

p.ex: [w ale :c] [w taf] [w riza] [w byt :i 3sg] [w byt :i lptc.f] [w bez] [w šev :i obl.sg]; [w ona] [w byt :i 3sg] [w se] [w byt :i lptc.f] [w təkanə :i f.sg] [w od] [w hore] [w do] [w dole].

sec.p: "But the tunic was without seam; it had been woven from top to bottom."

p.ex: [w stoha :c] [w byt :i 3pl] [w mu] [w rekat :i lptc.pl] [w edyn] [w do] [w druh :i obl.sg]: «[w ne] [w derat :i 1pl] [w go], [w ale] [w dat :i 3sg] [w vybyrat :i 1pl] [w po] [w žreb :i obl.sg] [w za] [w neho], [w od] [w koho] [w byt :i 3sg] [w on].»

sec.p: "Therefore they said to one another: 'Let us not tear it, but cast lots for it, whose it shall be.'"

p.ex: [w to :c] [w byt :i 3sg] [w byt :i lptc.n], [w dat :i 3sg] [w se] [w yspolnit :i 3sg] [w to] [w pismo], [w če] [w glagolat :i 3sg]: «[w ony :c] [w byt :i 3pl] [w razdelit :i lptc.pl] [w ti] [w moj :i pl] [w rob :i pl] [w mezy] [w sebe], [w i] [w za] [w taf] [w moj :i f.sg] [w riza :i obl.sg] [w byt :i 3pl] [w vybrat :i lptc.pl] [w po] [w žreb :i obl.sg].»

sec.p: "This happened so that the scripture might be fulfilled, which says: 'They divided my garments among themselves, and for my robe they cast lots.'"

p.ex: [w stoha :c] [w byt :i 3pl] [w ti] [w rytar :i pl] [w sdelat :i lptc.pl] [w to].

sec.p: "So the soldiers did this."

p.ex: [w ale :c] [w pri] [w krst :i obl.sg] [w od] [w ysus :i obl.sg] [w byt :i 3pl] [w stat :i lptc.pl] [w taf] [w nehov :i f.sg] [w majka] [w i] [w sestra] [w od] [w taf] [w nehov :i f.sg] [w majka :i obl.sg], [w marija] [w žena] [w od] [w klopas :i obl.sg], [w i] [w marija] [w mahdalena].

sec.p: "But by the cross of Jesus stood his mother, his mother's sister, Mary the wife of Clopas, and Mary Magdalene."
